use_cases: A versatile button component with multiple style variants for primary, secondary, destructive, and outline actions
An interactive button element with hover, focus-visible, and disabled states for form submissions
A customizable button supporting different sizes and appearances for consistent UI patterns
A button with optional arrow indicator support for dropdown or expandable actions
A theme-aware button component with light/dark mode support via Tailwind CSS classes
ai_summary: A flexible button component built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority, featuring 10+ style variants including primary, mono, destructive, outline, dashed, ghost, and dim. Supports multiple sizes, optional arrow indicators, and comprehensive interactive states including hover, focus-visible, and disabled. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for SaaS and general web applications with Tailwind CSS theming.
